conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt the strongest connection with J, as we both explicitly agreed to look out for each other and shared a deep, mutual commitment to supporting our families. G also stood out to me because our conversation about helping our parents and siblings felt very sincere, and I truly respected their selfless goals. I also felt a solid bond with B, who seemed just as concerned as I am about finding someone reliable to lean on in this high-stakes environment. On the other hand, I felt the least connected to H, whose cynical prediction that everyone will turn cutthroat made me feel like they might be the first to abandon any sense of cooperation.

I made informal agreements to look out for one another with J, B, and A, focusing on the idea that sticking together gives us all a better shot at the prize. I feel a genuine sense of trust toward J given our shared values and clear communication, but I specifically distrust H because they seem to expect betrayal as an inevitability.
